sources: Montgomery County BoE 2026 Candidate Petition Report (6/1/2026)
notes: Keys under each jurisdiction type match exact values in enriched_voters.parquet (verified 2026-06-23).
WARD/LOCAL_SCHOOL_DISTRICT/TOWNSHIP/VILLAGE stubs pending manual data entry from individual jurisdictions.
STATE_SENATE_DISTRICT 06 is not on the 2026 ballot (even-cycle seat last contested 2024); incumbent TBD.
Precinct central committee (precinct captains) are covered in serve/precinct_captains.json, keyed by exact PRECINCT_NAME parquet values.
COUNTY_COMMISSIONER and COUNTY_AUDITOR deferred to post-beta per handoff spec.

06.note: Not on 2026 ballot (even-cycle seat). Incumbent data pending.

39.note: No incumbent checkbox in filing data; may be open seat due to redistricting.

WARD._note: City council races not in BoE petition report. Populate manually per city. Dayton, Kettering, Huber Heights, Miamisburg, Clayton, Trotwood, Moraine wards are present in parquet.

LOCAL_SCHOOL_DISTRICT._note: School board elections not in BoE petition report. Populate manually. Districts present: BROOKVILLE LOCAL SD (MONTG), JEFFERSON TOWNSHIP LOCAL SD (MONTG), MAD RIVER LOCAL SD (MONTG), NEW LEBANON LOCAL SD (MONTG), NORTHRIDGE LOCAL SD (MONTG), VALLEY VIEW LOCAL SD (MONTG).

TOWNSHIP._note: Township trustee races not in BoE petition report. Populate manually. Townships present: BUTLER, CLAY, CLEARCREEK, GERMAN, HARRISON, JACKSON, JEFFERSON, MIAMI, PERRY, WASHINGTON.

VILLAGE._note: Village council races not in BoE petition report. Populate manually. Villages present: FARMERSVILLE VILLAGE, NEW LEBANON VILLAGE, PHILLIPSBURG VILLAGE, VERONA VILLAGE.

COUNTY_COMMISSIONER.note: Deferred to post-beta per handoff spec.

COUNTY_AUDITOR.note: Deferred to post-beta per handoff spec.
